title:
Lilith's Passion:
Martyrdom Rite for Master Anshaer
content: It began with the first drop of cold sweat hitting the dry parchment. Anshaer never imagined that the so-called Underground Forest existed not beneath the crust, but within the cracks of sanity. Lilith stood there, holding a lantern fueled by souls, waiting with a quiet smile. The air was thick with the scent of ancient decay, and every groove in the trees felt like a martyr's cry. Can you hear it? The ticking of the clock, the prelude to the collapse of the old world. In this endless purple mist, all rules have faded—only pain remains true. This rite shall persist until the stars align, until Anshaer truly awakens... (Please insert your long-form story text here)
